title: Conceição: Autor Bom é Autor Morto
original_title: Conceição - Autor Bom é Autor Morto
overview: A group of young people is in a bar to drink, and they are trying to choose a story for the movie they are decided to make, but their characters are not very satisfied with the results of it.
